Description: A peaceful green valley filled with Colombia’s famous tall wax palm trees. I chose this place because it represents the natural beauty of Colombia, and I’d love to visit somewhere calm, fresh, and surrounded by nature. It feels like an adventure and a connection to my background.
Tokyo Tower and the surrounding city lights at night. I chose this place because Tokyo feels exciting and full of culture, modern architecture, and city energy that I want to experience.

The Nikola Tesla Museum building in Belgrade, showcasing exhibits about his inventions. I chose this place because I admire Tesla’s work and want to learn more about his life and groundbreaking discoveries.
A modern semiconductor fabrication facility in Taiwan — I chose this because as a computer engineer it represents the heart of global chip manufacturing and shows cutting edge technology in action.
Marina Bay Sands and Singapore’s modern cityscape — I chose this place because its infrastructure and urban planning are impressive, showcasing innovation and efficient design.
A typical New Jersey suburban home — I chose this place because I was born in the United States and many of my relatives still live there. It represents home, family and memories for me.
A spread of traditional Italian dishes — I chose this place because I love Italy’s cuisine and want to experience its authentic flavors firsthand

A beautiful view of the taiga forest and mountainous landscape of Sikhote-Alin. I chose this place because it’s one of the rare sanctuaries where wild Amur tigers live freely in their natural habitat, showcasing untouched wilderness.

The Mezquita-Catedral de Córdoba, an architectural marvel blending Islamic and Christian influences — I chose this place because it represents Spain’s rich history and some of the oldest mosques in Europe.
A picturesque canal in Amsterdam lined with historic houses — I chose this place because I love the charm of Dutch cities, their canals, and colorful tulip gardens.
